response.step_by_step_log: Identified songs through on-screen text: 'やがて女はきれいになるだろう' (Rhythm Heaven Fever, Remix 9) and '愛♡スクリーム!' (AiScReam). Performed a web search for both to verify artists and context. Due to the medley nature, lyrics for the medley were not easily retrievable as a single unit, so placeholders for lyrics are used.
response.global_summary: A video segment from a live performance featuring virtual idols, including dialogue/introductions followed by a medley performance featuring songs like 'Yagate Onna wa Kirei ni naru darou' and 'Ai♡Scream!'.

scenes.description: Dialogue and introductions before the performance.
Live performance medley of songs including 'Yagate Onna wa Kirei ni naru darou' and others.
scenes.song_title: Medley (incl. Yagate Onna wa Kirei ni naru darou)
